text_block_list.name: Aston Machan
text_block_list.text:
...You two really can't remember what today is?
That forgetful, huh?

text_block_list.name: Aston Machan
text_block_list.text:
And... you're so busy you don't have time to make
memories with Machan... I see.

text_block_list.name: Aston Machan
text_block_list.text:
I guess there's nothing to be done about it then...
I'll just go back to my room...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Ahh! I'm just not cut out for this! We can drop it,
right, Scarlet?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
We wanted to throw you a surprise party, but we
didn't get everything ready in time... Sorry, it'll
just be a little longer.

text_block_list.name: Aston Machan
text_block_list.text:
Vodka, Scarlet... This is amazing! I couldn't be
happier!

text_block_list.name: Aston Machan
text_block_list.text:
Not only did you remember my birthday, you
planned a party just for me...

text_block_list.name: Aston Machan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that would make a great video. Do you think
you could do that again, on camera this time?
